description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, broad blade that tapers slightly towards the tip. The blade is metallic and has a dark, matte finish, suggesting it is made of steel or iron. The hilt features a prominent crossguard with ornate, gold-colored detailing, providing both protection and a decorative touch. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark material, and ends in a rounded pommel that appears to be metallic and possibly brass or gold-plated. The overall design is reminiscent of medieval European longswords, combining both functional and decorative elements. The sword is visually striking and would stand out in an urban context, such as a display, collection, or themed event.
description: A long, double-edged sword with a dark metallic blade, ornate gold crossguard, and a wrapped cylindrical handle ending in a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade, ornate crossguard, and detailed handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the slim profile of the blade and the handle's end.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped, rounded pommel, metallic accents
